theory.canonical_statement: ID5188 records Coupled Casimir Lemniscate Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\CSV\TZPID_KDP_batches\TZPID_KDP_batch_0005.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $\hat{H} \hat{n}(t) \subsection*{[ID 0602] INFORMATION DENSITY TRACKING} I_{density} = \log_2(153,600) \approx 17.23 \text{ bits/transition} \subsection*{[ID 0603] CASIMIR BOUNDARY OPTIMIZATION} \Delta E = E_{vacuum}(B) - E_{vacuum}(A) = \int_{lemniscate} E_{Casimir} dA \subsection*{[ID 0604] HIGGS-FIELD MASS-INVERSION OPERATOR ($
